case_title: GALLIPEAU, GREGOIRE F. MR. VS DARWISH, ABE MR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DARWISH, ABE MR. DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREGOIRE GALLIPEAU ON FEB. 5. 2001. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CROSS COMPLAINT DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE. NON-APPEARANCE OF PARTIES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF GALLIPEAU, GREGOIRE F. MR.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GALLIPEAU, GREGOIRE F. MR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,430.15 FILED BY GALLIPEAU, GREGOIRE F. MR. AS TO DEFENDANT DARWISH, ABE MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DARWISH, ABE MR.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,750.00 FILED BY DARWISH, ABE MR. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GALLIPEAU, GREGOIRE F. MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-15-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-22-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED AS TO CROSS COMPLAINT. PARTIES SETTLED. PLTF GALLIPEAU IS TO HAVE HIS VEHICLE REMOVED FROM DEFT DARWISH'S SHOP BY 2/26/01.IF NO APPEARANCES ON 3/22/01, DEFT'S CLAIM WILL BE DISMISSED.
